posts.text:
The 2026 Index of Military Strength is the only independent and comprehensive assessment of the U.S. military, including its capacity, capability, readiness, and ability to contend with national threats. 

Learn more about the risks and opportunities facing the U.S. military: heritage.org/2026-military

Video

“Any movement that prioritizes the desires of confused men over the needs of expectant mothers is an enemy, not a friend, to women across the globe.”

The U.N. Commission on the Status of Women has long been hijacked by progressives and radical feminists pushing gender ideology and abortion, but the Trump administration is pushing back.

Video
Only Americans should be voting in American elections.

The SAVE America Act would make sure non-citizens can’t vote in American elections.

If you oppose that, you’re probably trying to cheat.

Applications close March 24 for Heritage’s George C. Marshall Fellowship. This program provides young and mid-career conservative professionals with the opportunity to apply the principles of grand strategy and the integration of all instruments of national power to achieve our national security interests, with a focus on deterring China, Western Hemisphere security, and the defense budget process.

Learn more and apply today: heritage.org/george-c-marsha…

An operation in Iran that is “swift, decisive, and effective,” could turn out to be a masterstroke of peace through strength.

@KevinRobertsTX explains: foxnews.com/opinion/trumps-o…
Requiring proof of voter eligibility is not a burden; it’s the bare minimum.

“We have to assume sleeper cells are inside the country.” - @lora_ries

Our national security is in jeopardy, and Congressional Democrats are still playing games with DHS funding.

Video

You won’t want to miss our special event this Thursday on “Catholicism and the American Founding,” featuring special guest @michaeljknowles. 

Register to watch: heritage.org/religious-liber…
Join us for a panel with leading conservative women this Wednesday for a deep-dive on womanhood, work-life balance, and public policy. Register here: heritage.org/conservatism/ev…

"If you see something, it's certainly the time to say something."
